LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.description:
A single Arachne Queen—Titan strain lands on a desolate edge world, ready to begin establishing her own hive.
<color=#915a30><i>Titan tendrils Titan tendrils are the main force of the Arachne swarm, comprising the most resilient and adaptable branch of the swarm, tasked with maintaining the front line in battle. This sub-branch has balanced offensive and defensive capabilities, excelling at a hard-hitting mode to eliminate opponents.
LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.label: Aranea Hive-Titan Tentacle
LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.scenario.descri:
A single Arachne Queen-Titan lands on a desolate edge world, ready to begin establishing her own hive.
<color=#915a30><i>Titan tendrils Titan tendrils are the main force of the Arachne swarm, comprising the most resilient and adaptable branch of the swarm, tasked with maintaining the front line in battle. This sub-branch has balanced offensive and defensive capabilities, excelling at a hard-hitting mode to annihilate opponents.
LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.scenario.name: Aranea Hive-Titan Tentacle
LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.scenario.summar: Start with a female Titan Arkenea as the initial colonists, plus five Arkenean egg capsules.
